description: ABI Framework hooks: blocks circular @import("abi") in src/, warns on .zigversion edits, and flags mod.zig public API changes that need stub.zig sync.

hooks.prompt: Look at the tool_input.file_path. If it ends with 'mod.zig' and contains '/features/' in the path, check whether the new_string (for Edit) or content (for Write) added, removed, or changed a public declaration (any line starting with 'pub fn', 'pub const', or 'pub var'). If yes, add a systemMessage: 'mod.zig was modified with public API changes — update stub.zig to maintain parity and run: zig build check-parity'. If no public declarations changed, output nothing.
